prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical lifestyle photo in a cozy modern apartment living room at night. An adult woman with ash brown shoulder-length wavy hair sits barefoot on a large round white shag rug, wearing a white sleeveless tank top and pale blue shorts. She is seated on the floor with one arm resting beside her, knees bent and legs extended diagonally toward the lower right, looking gently downward toward a sleeping orange tabby kitten curled beside her foot. The woman's face should be anonymized with a soft square blur or neutral obscuring patch, while keeping the rest of the image realistic. The room is warm and softly lit by a round ceiling light and a small table lamp; include exactly one white sofa with a white throw blanket, exactly two wooden shelving units filled with books, framed photos, small decor, and plants, exactly one large sliding glass window on the right showing a dark nighttime balcony/city view, and exactly one visible orange tabby kitten curled up on the rug. Use natural wood flooring, cream walls, white curtains, potted greenery, a calm intimate atmosphere, shallow depth of field, realistic indoor photography, warm color grading, and a candid smartphone-photo composition. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no additional pets.
